title: vitis × andersonii
intro: Vitis × andersonii, also known as Mission grape, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Vitis genus, which includes various types of grapes. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antifungal and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Vitis × andersonii include its potential to aid in the treatment of various ailments, such as skin conditions and fever, due to its anti-inflammatory properties. Vitis × andersonii is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves or roots in hot water.
